calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Moallem, for petitiner Dean Edenson.

Ms. Moallem responded to the Examiner's Noted by acknowledging her error in not having submitted an ex parte petiton to modify the amount of the bond, which she now knew she would need to do in the future. Regarding the request for extraordinary fees, she stated that it is her firm's policy to seek payment for all services rendered, knowing that the Court had the power to adjust the fees awarded, and that she was willing to submit the matter for the Court's determination of what was appropriate. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To May-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Confirming Title Of Real Property To The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Moallem for Dean Edenson (Administrator).

Ms. Maollem stated that title is already 100% interest, made reference to the marital settlement agreement attached to the divorce judgment and stated that she wanted to provide Mr. Marty with the opportunity to claim any interest. The Court granted the Petition Confirming Title of Real Property to the Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

Petition Confirming Title Of Real Property To The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for petitioner Dean Edenson.

The Court stated that there was a discrepancy regarding the decedent's mother's name, and questioned whether she used Betty Carl, Betty Edenson, or both. Mr. Mraule replied that both were names used by the same person, and that he would be filing a declaration to that effect. The Court stated that he was willing to grant the petition upon that representation, but asked counsel to go ahead and file the declaration. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The Court noted that the amount of the bond needed to be rounded up to the next $1000, and set bond at $561,000.00.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)
